headline: Space Exploration Technologies Corporation to Join the Nasdaq-100 Index® Beginning July 7, 2026
summary: NEW YORK, June 26, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Nasdaq (Nasdaq: NDAQ) today announced that Space Exploration Technologies Corporation (Nasdaq: SPCX) will become a component of the Nasdaq-100 Index® prior to market open on Tuesday, July 7, 2026.
